revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flag_athlete%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|fla}} ==Usage== :{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''Athlete's name''|''Country code or name''|''optional flag variant''|code=''optional code value''}} ==Examples== {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Michael Phelps|Michael Phelps]]|USA}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|GBR}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Werner Günthör]]|SUI}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Orukpe Erayokan]]|NIG}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}}}} ==Parameters== {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Athlete's name", "description": "Name of the athlete. May be wikilinked.", "type": "content", "required": true }, "2": { "label": "Country code or name", "description": "Selects the country whose flag is to be shown.", "example": "ITA", "type": "string", "required": true }, "3": { "aliases": [ "variant" ], "label": "Variant", "description": "Selects the variant of the flag to be used; see Template:Flag.", "example": "1965", "type": "string" }, "code": { "label": "Country code for display", "description": "The code to display after the name, if different to parameter 2, \"Country code or name\".", "example": "YUG", "default": "The value of parameter 2." } }, "description": "Generates an inline flag, followed by an athlete's name, followed by a country code.", "format": "inline" } ==Alternatives to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using modules or module-wrapper templates instead: * {{tl|flagg}} is a simple wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]]: For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{flagg|unaep|''country code or name''|preftext=''athlete's name''}}. To use IOC country codes, replace unaep with unaepi. * {{ml|flag|athlete}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can further reduce sizes when invoked directly. For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{#invoke:flag|athlete|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, add {{para|opts|i}}. ==See also== *[[Template:Flag team]], a similar template useful for entire teams instead of individual names *[[Template:Flag medalist]] a similar template with expanded country names *[[:en:Template:Flag link medalist|Template:Flag link medalist]] a similar template with expanded country names and country info on one line *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations *[[Template:Flag IOC athlete]], a similar template for use with athletes at the Olympics *[[:en:Template:Flag link athlete|Template:Flag link athlete]], a similar template to provide links to countries at editions of athletics championships {{Flag templates}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Template shortcut|fla}} ==Usage== :{{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''Athlete's name''|''Country code or name''|''optional flag variant''|code=''optional code value''}} ==Examples== {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Michael Phelps|Michael Phelps]]|USA}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Bjørn Dæhlie|Bjørn Dæhlie]]|NOR}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Nedo Nadi|Nedo Nadi]]|ITA|1861}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Elisabeta Lipă|Elisabeta Lipă]]|ROU|1965}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|ENG}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[:en:Daley Thompson|Daley Thompson]]|GBR}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Werner Günthör]]|SUI}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Orukpe Erayokan]]|NIG}}}} {{nowiki template demo|format=inline|output=nowiki+|code={{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|[[Jasna Šekarić]]|FR Yugoslavia|code=YUG}}}} ==Parameters== {{TemplateDataHeader}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Athlete's name", "description": "Name of the athlete. May be wikilinked.", "type": "content", "required": true }, "2": { "label": "Country code or name", "description": "Selects the country whose flag is to be shown.", "example": "ITA", "type": "string", "required": true }, "3": { "aliases": [ "variant" ], "label": "Variant", "description": "Selects the variant of the flag to be used; see Template:Flag.", "example": "1965", "type": "string" }, "code": { "label": "Country code for display", "description": "The code to display after the name, if different to parameter 2, \"Country code or name\".", "example": "YUG", "default": "The value of parameter 2." } }, "description": "Generates an inline flag, followed by an athlete's name, followed by a country code.", "format": "inline" } ==Alternatives to avoid Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit== Pages with many flag icons may come close to or exceed Wikipedia's [[WP:PEIS|Post-expand include size]] limit. In these cases consider using modules or module-wrapper templates instead: * {{tl|flagg}} is a simple wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]]: For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{flagg|unaep|''country code or name''|preftext=''athlete's name''}}. To use IOC country codes, replace unaep with unaepi. * {{ml|flag|athlete}} is a wrapper for [[Module:Flagg]] that can further reduce sizes when invoked directly. For basic use, {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}} can be replaced with {{#invoke:flag|athlete|''athlete's name''|''country code or name''}}. To use IOC country codes, add {{para|opts|i}}. ==See also== *[[Template:Flag team]], a similar template useful for entire teams instead of individual names *[[Template:Flag medalist]] a similar template with expanded country names *[[:en:Template:Flag link medalist|Template:Flag link medalist]] a similar template with expanded country names and country info on one line *[[Template:Flag]] and [[Template:Flag icon]] for additional discussion about flag variations *[[Template:Flag IOC athlete]], a similar template for use with athletes at the Olympics *[[:en:Template:Flag link athlete|Template:Flag link athlete]], a similar template to provide links to countries at editions of athletics championships {{Flag templates}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
